TIT.^T.ft. 704 (3T), mf@ 20 S T ^ , 1999 26. m^T.ft. 814(3T),^Kte 16 R-HHi, 1999 27. m^T.f=T. 169(31), circfe 12 Hf3, 2001 28. m^T.ft 100(-3T), ctRfe 11 WFtfl, 2003 29. m^T.ft. 290(3T), ^ # © 16 3T^T, 2008 I MINISTRY OF HEALTH AND FAMILY WELFARE (Department of Health) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 11th December, 2009 G.S.R. 885(E).—Whereas the Central Government is satisfied that use of the drug Rimonabant is likely to involve certain risk to human beings and whereas safer alternatives to the said drug is available; And whereas the Central Government is satisfied that it is necessary and expedient to prohibit the manufacture, sale and distribution ofthe said drug in the public interest; Now, therefore, in exercise ofthe powers conferred by Section 26A ofthe Drugs and Cosmetic Act, 1940 (23 of 1940), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendment in the notification ofthe Government of India in the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare number G.S.R. 578(E), dated the 23rd July, 1983, namely: - In the Table appended to the said notification, SI. Number 59 and entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entry shall be inserted, namely :— " 60. Rimonabant." [F. No. X-1 i 014/3/2009-DFQC | VLNEETCHAWDHRY, Jt. Secy. Foot Note: The principal notification was published vide No. G.S.R. 578(E), dated the 23rd July, 1983 in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part 11, Sectinn 3, Sub-section (i) and subsequently amended vide ;—• 1.
